description_long: This is a standard wine bottle with a dark, nearly black glass body and a long, slender neck. The bottle features a blue foil or capsule covering the top and neck, giving it a refined appearance. A large, cream-colored label wraps around the front and back, with a circular emblem and text visible on the front. The label includes a blue and gold circular logo, likely representing the wine's brand, and additional text in a serif font. The bottle's shoulders are broad and gently sloped, leading to a cylindrical body that tapers slightly toward the base. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the smooth, hard surface of the glass.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a blue foil capsule, cream label, and glossy finish. The front label features a blue and gold circular logo and serif text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream label with a blue and gold circular logo and readable text.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the label, which is mostly blank or contains fine print.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, with the label and logo clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with the label's back side, lacking prominent branding or graphics.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large cream-colored label wraps around the bottle, with a blue and gold circular logo centered on the front. The label contains serif text, with the logo and text occupying most of the visible label area. The label is rectangular and covers a significant portion of the bottle's body.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, slender, and straight neck with a slight taper toward the top, covered by a blue foil capsule.
